name: Iskenderun Demir ve Celik A.S.
summary: Iskenderun Demir ve √É¬áelik A.S. produces and sells iron and steel products in Turkey. The company offers hot-rolled flat steel products, such as rolls or sheet metals, and plates. It also provides various billets, such as steel for production of patterned reinforcing bars, structural steel for production of angle bars and profiles, steel for production of structural steel shapes for vessels, and chromium-alloys and high-carbon steel for the automotive industry; and coils. In addition, it offers byproducts, including motor and pure benzol, toluol, xylol, raw tar, ammonium sulfate, iron sulfate, and granulated blast furnace slag; and coke, oxygen, nitrogen, and argon. Further, the company provides training and laboratory services; and port services, including maritime, customs, and security services. It also exports its products to Southern Europe and Middle Eastern countries. The company was founded in 1970 and is based in Hatay, Turkey. Iskenderun Demir ve √É¬áelik A.S. is a subsidiary of Eregli Demir ve √É¬áelik Fabrikalari T.A.S.
